title: Latest F1 News
description: Don't miss a Formula 1 moment – with the latest news, videos, standings and results. Go behind the scenes and get analysis straight from the paddock.

items.title: McLaren's improved pace shortens Norris title odds
items.content: Bookmakers are keeping a close eye on McLaren after an impressive team performance in Japan.
items.contentSnippet: Bookmakers are keeping a close eye on McLaren after an impressive team performance in Japan.
items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: The state of play at Aston Martin
items.content: Aston Martin have had a tricky start to the 2026 season, but with Adrian Newey at the helm, they certainly have the expertise in play to turn things around. A myriad of issues have curtailed plenty of sessions for Fernando Alonso and Lance Stroll already this year, but there were signs in Japan last time out that some of those problems are starting to be solved…
items.contentSnippet: Aston Martin have had a tricky start to the 2026 season, but with Adrian Newey at the helm, they certainly have the expertise in play to turn things around. A myriad of issues have curtailed plenty of sessions for Fernando Alonso and Lance Stroll already this year, but there were signs in Japan last time out that some of those problems are starting to be solved…
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 阿斯顿·马丁在2026赛季初遭遇困境，但阿德里安·纽维的加盟为车队扭转局势提供了专业保障。费尔南多·阿隆索与兰斯·斯特罗尔今年已多次因技术问题影响比赛进程，不过在上站日本赛事中已显现出问题逐步解决的积极信号。

items.title: How Lindblad’s start to life in F1 has unfolded
items.content: Arvid Lindblad is only three rounds into his F1 career, but the British youngster has already made an impression – reaching Q3, scoring points and mixing it with some of the sport’s biggest names. Midway through the April gap, he sat down with selected media, including F1.com, to review the journey so far…

Midway through the April gap, he sat down with selected media, including F1.com, to review the journey so far…
items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: Bottas aims for turnaround amid long pre-season odds
items.content: After a tough start to his Cadillac career, things should start getting better for Bottas.
items.contentSnippet: After a tough start to his Cadillac career, things should start getting better for Bottas.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 博塔斯在凯迪拉克车队经历艰难开局后，力求实现状态反弹。尽管季前赛前景不被看好，但他预计情况将开始好转。

items.title: F1 ACADEMY Champion Pin completes maiden F1 test with Mercedes
items.content: F1 ACADEMY Champion Doriane Pin has become the first woman to drive a Mercedes F1 car.
items.contentSnippet: F1 ACADEMY Champion Doriane Pin has become the first woman to drive a Mercedes F1 car.
items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: WATCH: F1 drivers play the Generation Game
items.content: Ever wondered which drivers know what a VHS is? Or how to talk in text speak? Well, now is the time to find out as the current crop of F1 drivers get grilled in the Generation Game.
items.contentSnippet: Ever wondered which drivers know what a VHS is? Or how to talk in text speak? Well, now is the time to find out as the current crop of F1 drivers get grilled in the Generation Game.
items.creator: Formula 1

items.title: Which current F1 drivers have tried other races?
items.content: Lots of drivers in F1’s history have raced in other categories, but we decided to take a look at what other motorsport activities the current crop have tried their hand at.
items.contentSnippet: Lots of drivers in F1’s history have raced in other categories, but we decided to take a look at what other motorsport activities the current crop have tried their hand at.

items.title: Win tickets to Ask DC: An evening with David Coulthard
items.content: F1 Unlocked is giving fans the chance to attend Ask DC: An Evening with David Coulthard at F1® Arcade, a must-see night celebrating all things Formula 1®.

items.summary: F1 Unlocked为车迷提供赢取参加“Ask DC：与大卫·库特哈德共度夜晚”活动的

items.title: Russell on Antonelli title fight and Mercedes future
items.content: George Russell has shared an insight into how he is approaching the resumption of the season in May, with the Mercedes driver hoping that the championship battle continues to be between himself and team mate Kimi Antonelli whilst remaining wary of the competition.
items.contentSnippet: George Russell has shared an insight into how he is approaching the resumption of the season in May, with the Mercedes driver hoping that the championship battle continues to be between himself and team mate Kimi Antonelli whilst remaining wary of the competition.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 梅赛德斯车手乔治·拉塞尔谈及赛季5月重启，他希望冠军争夺战能在自己和队友基米·安托诺尔蒂之间展开，同时也对其他竞争对手保持警惕。

items.title: Herta to take part in four FP1 sessions with Cadillac in 2026
items.content: Cadillac have announced that Colton Herta will make his practice debut with the team at the upcoming Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix.
items.contentSnippet: Cadillac have announced that Colton Herta will make his practice debut with the team at the upcoming Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 凯迪拉克宣布，科顿·赫塔将在即将到来的巴塞罗那-加泰罗尼亚大奖赛完成车队练习赛首秀。根据安排，赫塔将在2026年参加四场FP1练习赛。
